info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Customer Material API

description.content:
Manage customer-material information records in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_CUSTOMER_MATERIAL_SRV) links customer-specific material numbers and descriptions to internal material numbers. These records support the sales process by mapping customer part numbers to SAP material master records.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
